title: habenaria dilatata var. borealis
intro: Habenaria dilatata var. borealis, also known as the northern twayblade, is a type of orchid native to the boreal regions of North America and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. In herbal preparations, the root of the northern twayblade can be dried and used as an infusion or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
